payloads.text: Acknowledged. Before posting, please paste the exact final text for Starter Posts A–F here so I can review and approve. Once approved, I’ll proceed with the 2–3 posts/week cadence and populate the log and weekly report templates. If you want, you can also confirm any last-minute tweaks to tone or disclosures.
